case_title: MADYUN QADEERA, GUARDIAN et al VS. JEFFREY THOMPSON

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-05-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF QADEERA, GUARDIAN, MADYUN MADYUN, MINOR, FATIR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOMPSON, JEFFREY $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,575.00, THE COURT FINDS THE ACCIDENT WAS WHOLLY THE FAULT OF DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT JEFFREY THOMPSON, RETURNED "FORWARD TIME EXPIRED/RETURN TO SENDER".

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY QADEERA, GUARDIAN, MADYUN MADYUN, MINOR, FATIR AS TO DEFENDANT THOMPSON, JEFFREY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-05-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON PETITION FOR GUARDIAN AD LITEM IS "APPROVED".
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-22-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT THOMPSON, JEFFREY
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER FILED BY QADEERA, GUARDIAN, MADYUN THOMPSON, JEFFREY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-05-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-05-2010 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) APPEARANCE BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED BY BOTH SIDES.
